name: siteforge
description: Rough 3D architecture planning scenes from public terrain and elevation data.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @siteforge/shared && npm run build -w @siteforge/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @siteforge/shared && npm run lint -w @siteforge/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @siteforge/shared && npm run test -w @siteforge/web
